entities.name: manifest.json
entities.context: Configuration file that tracks meeting processing blocks and their status

entities.name: transcript.md
entities.context: Source transcript file for meeting processing

entities.name: DETAILED_RECAP
entities.context: Meeting block type for comprehensive meeting summary, priority 1

entities.name: COMMITMENTS
entities.context: Meeting block type for tracking action items and commitments, priority 1

entities.name: STAKEHOLDER_INTELLIGENCE
entities.context: Meeting block type for participant analysis, triggered when 3+ participants detected, priority 2

entities.name: [M] suffix convention
entities.context: Folder naming pattern indicating meeting has been processed with manifest

relationships.context: Manifest tracks DETAILED_RECAP as a pending block
Manifest tracks COMMITMENTS as a pending block
Manifest tracks STAKEHOLDER_INTELLIGENCE as conditionally triggered block
Both are block types in the same meeting processing system
Manifest references transcript as source file path
